steps.t: Strawberries are growing wild along certain paths, and mushrooms are all over the forest bed near Long Cleeve's river. Meregrot North-took has asked y…
Meregrot is sitting by the river, south-east of Long Cleeve. You should bring the mushrooms and strawberries to Meregrot.
Meregrot is sitting by the river, south-east of Long Cleeve. Meregrot North-took has asked you to place the mushrooms and strawberries in the picnic b…
Meregrot is sitting by the river south-east of Long Cleeve. You should talk to Meregrot.
The basket is beside Meregrot, south-east of Long Cleeve. Meregrot North-took has asked you to pick up the picnic basket on the blanket beside her and…
Rosalinda North-took can be found in Long Cleeve. Meregrot has asked you to bring the picnic basket to her daughter Rosalinda.
